name: OneMain Financial
description_short: OneMain Financial is a century-old personal loan lender offering $1,500–$30,000 fixed-rate installment loans for consolidation, emergencies, and major purchases.
description_long:
OneMain Financial has been serving American consumers for over 100 years, making it one of the oldest and most established names in consumer lending. The company operates a network of physical branch locations nationwide, including this W Flagler St branch in Miami, FL. Unlike pure fintech lenders, OneMain combines an online application process with in-person loan specialists who can walk borrowers through each step. This longevity reflects a consistent focus on serving near-prime and non-prime borrowers who may not qualify at traditional banks.

OneMain offers personal installment loans from $1,500 to $30,000 with repayment terms of 24 to 60 months. Fixed APRs range from 11.99% to 35.99%, and both secured and unsecured loan options are available. Secured loans — backed by collateral such as a vehicle — may help borrowers qualify for higher amounts or more favorable terms. Loan proceeds can be used for a wide range of purposes: debt consolidation, auto purchase, auto refinance, medical bills, home improvement, moving, weddings, emergency expenses, pool financing, vacations, motorcycles, RVs, boats, and funeral costs. Pre-qualification is offered online without a hard credit inquiry.

OneMain's SpeedFunds program enables approved borrowers to receive funds in as little as one hour after loan closing via an eligible bank-issued debit card — competitive with same-day emergency lenders. There are no prepayment fees, allowing borrowers to pay down their loan early and reduce total interest without penalty. Physical branches with after-hours appointment availability distinguish OneMain from fully digital competitors, providing face-to-face guidance particularly valuable for first-time borrowers or those navigating complex financial situations. Closing can also be done by phone for added flexibility.

OneMain Financial fills a genuine market gap for borrowers with fair or poor credit who need structured installment financing from a regulated lender. However, its APR ceiling of 35.99% is very high — approaching credit card territory — and can make borrowing costly for those assigned higher rates. Borrowers with strong credit will almost certainly find significantly lower rates at banks, credit unions, or competing online lenders. The $30,000 maximum may also be insufficient for larger financing needs. For those who have been declined elsewhere and need a predictable fixed-payment loan with no prepayment penalty from a long-established lender, OneMain is a far safer option than payday or title lenders — but rate comparison with other lenders is strongly recommended before committing.
address: 111 Coors Blvd NW Ste E1-E2, Albuquerque, NM 87121

company_info.headquarters: 111 Coors Blvd NW Ste E1-E2, Albuquerque, NM 87121

pros: Over 100 years in business — one of the oldest consumer lenders in the US
SpeedFunds: receive money in as little as 1 hour after closing via debit card
No prepayment fees — pay off early without penalty
Fixed rates and fixed monthly payments — no surprise payment changes
Both secured and unsecured loan options available
Pre-qualification available online without affecting credit score
Physical branches with after-hours appointments for in-person guidance
cons: Maximum APR of 35.99% is very high — near credit card interest rates
Loan ceiling of $30,000 is lower than many competing personal loan lenders
Minimum loan of $1,500 makes it unsuitable for very small cash needs
Primarily serves non-prime borrowers — strong-credit applicants can do better elsewhere
Branch-heavy model may feel cumbersome for fully digital borrowers
best_for: Borrowers with fair or poor credit who cannot qualify at banks or credit unions
Consumers seeking debt consolidation with predictable fixed monthly payments
People who prefer in-person loan assistance from a local branch specialist
Borrowers needing same-day funding for an urgent expense
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best for near-prime or subprime borrowers who need a structured installment loan with fixed payments and want the option of in-person branch support. The main caveat is cost: APRs up to 35.99% make this an expensive option, and any borrower who qualifies elsewhere should compare rates before choosing OneMain.
